rationale: The citation is used in the model-development section, not as a passing background mention. The authors explicitly place Villas-Boas and Zhao (2005) in the set of structural channel models with endogenous manufacturer and retailer pricing and then state that their own model expands this literature by adding CDI decisions. That makes the cited paper a meaningful methodological and conceptual base for the citing paper's framework.
relation_description: The citing paper builds on the endogenous manufacturer-retailer pricing framework represented by Villas-Boas and Zhao (2005) and extends it by adding a customer data intermediary layer with decisions about whom to sell targeting services to, what data depth to use, and how to price the service.
